orgPolicy.title: Scorecard Human-Written Summary Required
orgPolicy.summary: Scorecards must include a human-authored summary — not just BrightHire/AI-generated transcriptions. This is the #1 flag in hiring committee right now. Do not submit to HC if a scorecard is missing its human summary. A delayed submission is better than an incomplete one.
bullets: Every scorecard needs a human-led synthesis/summary — AI tools support, not replace, the interviewer's voice
Missing summaries will be flagged in HC and reflect on Invite as a function
Do not submit to hiring committee if any scorecard still lacks a human summary
Invite is working on automations to reduce friction — more coming soon

tp.point: Scorecards need a human-written summary, not just an AI transcript. Flag your interviewers now — missing summaries will be called out in HC.

orgPolicy.title: FY27 Offer Calculators Updated — Variable Comp Now Live
orgPolicy.summary: Updated offer calculators are live in the shared Drive folder. L6 variable target increased from 20% to 25%. L1–L5 calculators now include variable comp fields (hourly: $1,250 flat; L1–L3: 5%; L4: 7.5%; L5: 10%). Comp sheets are currently broken — interim workaround is to view comp ranges in Greenhouse job details.
bullets: New calculators saved in Drive — use these for all new offers going forward
L6 variable target: 25% (up from 20%)
L1–L3: 5%, L4: 7.5%, L5: 10% variable; hourly: $1,250 flat
Comp sheets are temporarily broken — view comp range in GH job details (Loom walkthrough available)
Invite PEs have a master spreadsheet of all comp bands — ping your PE if needed

tp.point: New offer calculators are live — use them. Comp sheets are broken right now; use Greenhouse job details for comp ranges or ping your PE.

orgPolicy.title: New Variable Cash Award Field in Greenhouse Offer Details
orgPolicy.summary: Greenhouse now has a new 'Are they receiving a % Variable Cash Award?' field in offer details. Three options: No – Hourly/Not Eligible, Yes – US Candidate, Yes – CANADA Candidate. When Yes is selected, a % field appears. Always double-check offer details before sending.
bullets: New GH offer detail field for variable cash award — three options based on employment type/location
When Yes selected, enter the % (L1–L3: 5%, L4: 7.5%, L5: 10% / hourly: flat $1,250)
Program is 50% individual / 50% company performance split
Always verify offer details before sending offer letters

tp.point: There's a new variable cash field in every GH offer — make sure your team knows how to fill it out correctly before their next offer.

orgPolicy.title: Hiring Committee Facilitation Now Owned by Invite Leadership
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Leadership is now facilitating Hiring Committee sessions and follow-ups. Invite Ops continues to support with candidate preps. For questions or status updates on submitted candidates, reach out to your Invite PE — not Invite Ops.
bullets: HC facilitation ownership shifted to Invite PEs/Leadership
Invite Ops still handles candidate prep support
For HC questions or candidate status updates → contact your Invite PE directly

tp.point: HC questions now go to your PE, not Invite Ops. Make sure your team knows who to ask.

orgPolicy.title: Onboarding Location Field Updated in Greenhouse
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech updated the Onboarding Location field in offer details so Workday can properly ingest the data. New options: Remote, San Francisco, New York, Denver. Ensure accuracy — this feeds directly to the Onboarding team.
bullets: Onboarding Location field now has 4 options: Remote, San Francisco, New York, Denver
Data feeds directly to Onboarding team for new hire logistics
Always confirm the correct onboarding location before submitting offer

tp.point: Double-check the Onboarding Location field on your next offer — it now has specific options and feeds directly to onboarding.

orgPolicy.title: Invite Within The Law — Legal/Compliance Resource Now Live
orgPolicy.summary: Invite Ops has created a temporary resource page to help recruiters navigate legal or compliance questions that come up during recruiting. Invite Within the Law training sessions are paused while training is being refreshed.
bullets: Resource page: https://sites.google.com/gusto.com/invite-academy/invite-within-the-law
In-person training sessions paused while refreshing content
Use the resource page for any legal/compliance questions until training resumes

tp.point: Legal/compliance Q? New resource page is live. Share the link with your team.

keyEvents.theme: InviteOS — New Features Live + Beta Opportunity

items.heading: Pending Actions, Feedback Button, and Debrief/HC Agent Beta
bullets: InviteOS now has a 'Pending Actions' view — centralized hub for candidate emails, scorecards, and referrals to review
New 'Submit Feedback' button in-app for bug reports and feature requests → goes directly to PeopleTech Jira
Loom walkthrough available: https://www.loom.com/share/aabf4bd1aec243a39d47abba4df6c82b
Beta testers wanted for the Debrief & Hiring Committee Agent — reply in #invite-team to join

items.heading: Refreshed VMA Program: Standalone Interviews, Nomination Flow, Performance Tie-In
bullets: VMA Evolution launches August 3rd — modernized question bank, calibrated rubric, new AI mindset component
Standalone VMA interviews returning for all functions — no more consolidated interviews for Engineering (reintroduced immediately), CX returning by Q2
New credentialed nomination flow replacing self-volunteering — I&O partners with Invite PEs to nominate
VMA participation now a formal contribution for L3–L6 Gusties with activity thresholds
AI mindset component assesses learning/adaptability (not technical skills)
Comms went out to Gusto Admins June 12; Celena joining PE meeting next week to walk through nomination process
Escalation path: Kristin Ruehle for L1–L5, Scott Helmes for L6+

items.heading: Cycle 2 Active with 6 Initiatives; Invite Cycle Planning Tracker Now Live
bullets: Cycle 2 runs June 15–July 31. Six cross-org initiatives are logged in the Invite Cycle Planning Tracker.
Tracker lives in Notion: Invite Cycle Planning Tracker. Claude skill available to add/update initiatives without manual Notion wrangling.

Active initiatives: Headcount Planning Discovery (Jaime, Lisa), Standardized Intake Process (Michelle, Kebone), TA Skill Gap Map (Kebone, Michelle), L&D Roadmap (Kebone, Michelle), Reporting Dashboard (Teresa, Jaime), Recruiter AI Workflow Discovery (Teresa, Kebone)
People Staff priorities for Cycle 2: making Gusto more AI-native, modernizing People work delivery
Mid-quarter check-ins with PEs happening next week — no prep needed from recruiters

items.heading: Gabe Cadavillo Leaving End of Week (June 13)
bullets: Gabe Cadavillo (Lisa Pham's team) is leaving Gusto. His last day is end of this week.
4+ years of contributions; leaving in good standing

items.heading: Juneteenth — Gusto Closed June 19
bullets: Gusto is closed Friday, June 19th for Juneteenth
Plan candidate timelines accordingly

items.heading: Invite Team Onsite — Welcome Party at Bierstadt Lagerhaus
bullets: Welcome event confirmed at Bierstadt Lagerhaus — private 3-hour bar, 2-hour buffet, large games (beer pong, cornhole, ladder golf)
Time TBD: either 5–8pm or 5:30–8:30pm; calendar invite forthcoming
Tuesday events still being planned — PE team discussing options async

items.heading: People Insights Validating Workday Recruiter Permissions for Goose
bullets: Arthur Gonzalez (People Insights) asked PEs to validate the list of people holding the Primary Recruiter role in Workday
Goose will work like Axo for self-serve analytics — currently scoping recruiter access
Operational data (targets, fills) being scoped separately from analytical/directional insights
